title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.670 - Business defined
text:
490.670.  Business defined. — The term "business" shall include every kind of business, profession, occupation, calling or operation of institutions, whether carried on for profit or not.
(L. 1949 p. 275 § 2) 
(1952) Hospital held "business" within this section so that its records are made admissible. Melton v. St. L.P.S. Co., 363 Mo. 474, 251 S.W.2d 663.
